items.name: GeniusHTX/SWE-Skills-Bench
review_questions: What license governs benchmark use and summary?
Can its task/acceptance-criteria structure improve skills validation without copying benchmark content?
Which execution or dependency surfaces make scheduler-side evaluation unsafe?
Does it identify when skills add no value or cause token/regression costs?

items.name: microsoft/SkillOpt
review_questions: What license and attribution requirements apply?
Can bounded add/delete/replace skill optimization be distilled as doctrine without copying upstream text or running harnesses?
What validation, rollback, rejected-edit, and held-out scoring gates are reusable?
Which claims require independent verification before normalization?

items.name: Narwhal-Lab/MagicSkills
review_questions: What license governs the repository and skill contents?
Does it contain reusable corpus patterns rather than raw prompt dumps or generic tips?
Are there prompt-injection, executable-script, dependency, credential, or hidden-instruction risks?
Is any content unique enough to justify a source profile, skip note, or normalization queue item?
